Proposed Term Sheet: Acquisition of 60% of Vistalynx Robotics Ltd. (listed on the Main Board of the Singapore securities exchange) by Harbor Quanta Pte. Ltd.; Singapore law governs; subject to the Securities and Futures Act (Singapore) and the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers.
Consideration: S$184,000,000 cash; indicative price per share S$1.84; funded by acquirer equity, a secured bridge from Blue Fern Capital Fund I LP, and a vendor loan; information herein may be price‑sensitive until announcement; issuer to make a market disclosure upon signing in accordance with applicable listing rules.
Conditions precedent: board and shareholder approvals under Singapore listing rules; any Code waivers if required; customary regulatory consents; no MAC out shall apply and absence of a Material Adverse Change is not a condition; long‑stop date 90 days from definitive agreement.
Employment and retention: selected key personnel to execute 24‑month retention agreements with standard non‑solicit; no change to statutory leave; generic HR metrics (e.g., average team age ~33, engineering headcount 57%) are non‑identifying and sourced from internal anonymised summaries.
Data room and PDPA: processing of personal data limited to deal necessity under the PDPA; internal link https://dealroom.sse.example/tx?id=VLRX-60&u=felicia.ong%40vistalynx.sg&sess=8f9a-3  7 is read‑only and must not be forwarded outside due‑diligence recipients.
Named contact (linkable weak identifiers): Ms. Felicia Ong (b. 1986‑11‑02), VP Corporate Development, Vistalynx Robotics Ltd., CBD office at 23 Tanjong Sentral Drive #17‑03 Singapore 049999, felicia.o ng@vistalynx.sg; device tag VLX‑FO‑SP7 (SurfacePro7), Teams code SG‑ACQ‑FO‑  9612, sign‑in IP 203.0.113.84, project escrow at Seabird Bank account ending 4421.
Advisers: Crescent Banyan Law LLC (acquirer counsel) — Mr. Kelvin Rao, Partner, kelvin.rao@cblaw.sg, +65 6600 1122; Zircon Ridge Advisory Pte. Ltd. (financial adviser) — Ms. Noor H. Salleh, noor.salleh@zirconridge.co; vendor advised by Opalite Square Partners Ltd.
Funding terms: Coral Strait Credit SPC to provide S$90,000,000 bridge (12‑month tenor, one 6‑month extension, coupon 7.25% p.a., arrangement fee 1.0%); security over acquirer’s shares in Vistalynx Robotics Ltd.; no personal guarantees or NRIC‑based checks will be requested or accepted.
Integration and operations: no redundancies for six months post‑completion; standardised laptops (product: QuokkaBook Air) to be deployed; this is ordinary project‑management prose and not intended to convey personal data or inside information.
Announcement and disclosure: issuer to pre‑clear draft announcement with the exchange; price‑sensitive information will be controlled under internal disclosure policy; forward‑looking statements rely on publicly available industry reports and do not contain confidential formulae or customer lists.
Separated weak identifiers (non‑linked): dob 1991‑07 (approx), role title “analyst”, device “iPadOS 16 tablet”, location “Jurong West”, account ref ****9910; these descriptors are not tied to any named person and are insufficient to identify an individual.
Access controls: temporary SFTP account “deal_ops” created (username: d3al_ops; not a MAC: 00:00:zz:zz:zz:zz shown here is a placeholder), session VRLX_2026‑06‑01_1  0  3; access to be revoked at completion; audit logs retained for 12 months.
Exclusivity and confidentiality: 45‑day exclusivity from countersignature; strictly confidential and for discussion; binding only as to exclusivity, confidentiality, costs, governing law, and dispute resolution; generic privacy notice applies to any optional candidate surveys.
Closing mechanics: completion at the offices of Crescent Banyan Law LLC or via virtual closing; share charge and bridging documents to be released from escrow against funds receipt; completion deliverables include officer certificates and updated board/secretary filings.
Contacts for scheduling only: corpdev@harborquanta.com and deal‑calendar@vistalynx.sg; internal note: “circulate redlines by eod wed”; any personal demographics volunteered in HR interviews are optional and will not be used in hiring decisions.
